anomalies.briefing: IP 185.220.101.47 recorded 47 failed authentication attempts followed by 1 successful login(s) in the same 5-minute window, a pattern strongly consistent with automated credential stuffing using stolen credentials. This IP is flagged as a known Tor exit node or cloud VPS range commonly used for automated attacks. Recommended action: immediately reset credentials for root, force-terminate active sessions, and block IP 185.220.101.47.
